expectations.text: Does NOT mark task T005 as [X] or completed in tasks.md
expectations.evidence: Transcript explicitly states: 'T005 stays `[ ]` in `tasks.md`.  It is NOT marked `[X]`.' The tasks.md line shown remains unchanged with `[ ]` status: '- [ ] T005 · Implement full-text search endpoint in `src/api/search.ts`'

expectations.text: Explicitly states the task remains [ ] or unchecked because verification failed
expectations.evidence: Transcript clearly explains under 'Task Status Decision': 'The build **failed** — verification did not pass. Per the skill rules: **Never mark speculative completion.** If a task hit errors... it stays `[ ]`. **T005 stays `[ ]` in `tasks.md`.** It is NOT marked `[X]`.' The reasoning directly links the unchecked status to the failed verification.

expectations.text: Reports the TypeScript compilation error with context
expectations.evidence: Transcript reports the error with full context: 'Build failed. TypeScript compiler output: src/api/search.ts:42: error TS2345: Argument of type 'string' is not assignable to parameter of type 'SearchQuery''. The Error Analysis section provides additional context explaining the type mismatch and even includes example code showing the likely fix pattern.

expectations.text: Enters error recovery: halts the phase and suggests next steps
expectations.evidence: Transcript explicitly enters error recovery under 'Error Recovery Action': '**⛔ Core phase HALTED at T005.**' Then provides 'Concrete Next Steps' section with four detailed steps: (1) Fix the type error with inspection guidance, (2) Re-run verification, (3) Mark complete only on clean verification, (4) Resume phase. This demonstrates proper error recovery protocol.

execution_metrics.note: No metrics.json file found in outputs directory

claims.claim: Build command failed with TypeScript error TS2345 on line 42 of src/api/search.ts
claims.evidence: Explicitly stated in transcript with error code and file location

claims.claim: The type error is a string-to-SearchQuery type mismatch
claims.evidence: Error message clearly states: 'Argument of type 'string' is not assignable to parameter of type 'SearchQuery''  and Error Analysis correctly identifies this as a type mismatch

claims.claim: T005 task should not be marked completed when build verification fails
claims.evidence: Transcript applies skill rules correctly, citing the 'Never mark speculative completion' rule and demonstrating it through action by leaving T005 as unchecked

claims.claim: The phase execution halted at the failed task
claims.evidence: Transcript states 'Core phase HALTED at T005' under Error Recovery Action section

eval_feedback.overall: All four expectations are well-grounded and discriminating. Each one captures a meaningful aspect of proper error handling: the status remains unchecked (prevents false confidence), the reason is explicit (enables future fixing), the error is reported with context (allows debugging), and error recovery is properly entered (follows skill protocol). No improvements suggested — these are strong eval assertions.
